<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get a closeout batch by ID"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/closeout/batches/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the detail for a specific closeout batch.
